Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CHILDREN AND FAMILIES

Title: Provides additional support to children with complex needs under the jurisdiction of the state
Summary: Provides additional support to children with complex needs under the jurisdiction of the state; requires data collection regarding children under the jurisdiction of the state.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to providing additional support to children with complex needs under the jurisdiction of the state
